---
title: "Copilot AI Presentation"
format: pptx
---

## Copilot AI: AI‑Powered LinkedIn Outbound

- • AI‑powered LinkedIn outbound platform
- • Three self‑trained agents: Strategy, Targeting, Reply
- • Scales outbound sales without adding headcount

## The Problem

- • Manual SDR work is time‑consuming
- • Low scalability and high customer acquisition cost
- • Repetitive tasks drain resources

## Copilot AI Solution

- • End‑to‑end automation: Strategy → Targeting → Reply
- • AI agents learn from each other and from your data
- • Launch campaigns in minutes, pipeline starts in days

## How It Works

- 1️⃣ Strategy Agent: builds outbound plan
- 2️⃣ Targeting Agent: creates audience segments & writes outreach
- 3️⃣ Reply Agent: manages conversations, handles objections, books meetings

## Key Results

- • 2.1 M LinkedIn connections added
- • 35 % high‑intent conversations
- • 65 K+ high‑value meetings booked

## Use Cases

- • B2B Sales
- • Business Services
- • Financial Advisors
- • B2B Agencies

## Customer Success

- \"5 new households ≈ $3.3 M in assets\" – Sheena Schreiner
- \"200 introductions → 70 meetings\" – Aaron Curry
- \"70 % of revenue from Copilot AI\" – Chantil Ellenburg

## Pricing & Trial

- • Free trial available
- • Pricing tiers on website

## Next Steps

- • Sign up for free trial
- • Schedule a demo
- • Integrate with LinkedIn Sales Navigator
